Our Story

Born in Tunisia

نَفس

نَفس (Nafas) was born from a simple question asked at the Faculté de Mode in Monastir: what happens when Arabic calligraphy breathes through denim?

We upcycle denim — stitching together patchwork panels, raw offcuts, and repurposed fabric — then hand-paint or embroider classic Arabic words that carry weight: نَفس (breath), نور (light), روح (soul).

Every bag is a sentence. Every stitch is intentional. We make fashion that speaks your language.
